note: Canaries chosen to cover duplicate preservation, token-tone alignment, and wrapped-row behavior from the main tables (see README/tests).

canaries.comment: Duplicate token canary (韻段 37 in P169_T001) — checks duplicates preserved and tone count preserved.
Repeated tokens with interleaving duplicates (韻段 52 in P169_T001) — checks non-lossy tokenization and order.
Wrapped-row canary (韻段 17 in P169_T001) — checks merge/forward-fill and token-to-tone alignment.
